title: Opening for Software Engineer at Narayana Health Digital

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Narayana Health Digital
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
